enrichment.top_upsell_reason: Dedicated seats if usage is consistent across AEC tools
enrichment.all_upsells: AEC Collection; Fusion Mfg Ext; Fusion Sim Ext

homepage.title: PROLICHT - Designed to create
homepage.description: PROLICHT is a global manufacturer of architectural luminaires. We offer customized premium lighting concepts with infinite configurability.
homepage.text_excerpt:
PROLICHT - Designed to create
Content
20–26 April 2026
PROLICHT @ Milan Design Week 2026
This year again, Milan becomes the center of the international design scene – and we are right in the middle of it. During Milan Design Week 2026, you will find PROLICHT at multiple locations across the city: within different installations, exciting collaborations, and as part of extraordinary spatial concepts. Our Starting Points invite you to experience light in a new way.
Milan Design Week 2026
WHERE IDEAS TAKE SHAPE
LIGHT & BUILDING 2026
From the starting points of creativity to a fully realised spatial concept – our presence at Light + Building 2026 guided 9,500 visitors through new ways of thinking, design and application.
Light+Building 2026
COMING SOON
AI POWERED DIGITAL PLATFORM FOR CREATIVE LIGHTING SOLUTIONS
PROLICHT is introducing a new digital platform powered by AI. A completely new way to explore products and create lighting ideas faster than ever before.
Find out more
PRODUCT LAUNCH AT LIGHT + BUILDING 2026
Architecture begins where systems don’t restrict — but unlock possibility. At Light + Building, we’re not simply expanding our portfolio. We’re opening new dimensions within the systems you already design with.
More expression.
More freedom.
More room for what hasn’t been imagined yet.
Product Launch
CREATIVE FREEDOM
Structure, speed, support. Everything behind PROLICHT’s promise. Explore the systems and tools that support bold ideas.
FIND OUT MORE
INSIDE THE CREATIVE MIND
Different approaches. Same mindset.
A journey into the minds of three creators who embrace uncertainty, trust their instincts and let light guide their work.
Creative minds
WHERE DOES NEW COME FROM?
Some stories don’t lead to change.
They lead to seeing more clearly what’s been there all along.
Ours is one of them.
FIND OUT MORE
WE BELIEVE THAT NEW
DOESN'T JUST HAPPEN.
NEW IS CREATED.
This is why we give innovative people the freedom to question the known and create something new.
LEARN MORE ABOUT
CREATIVE FREEDOM
DESIGNED TO CREATE
We offer luminaires and lighting systems with the best quality of light and the freedom to create inspiring spaces exactly how people envision them.
ALL PRODUCTS
PRODUCT FAMILIES
FLOOR LAMPS
WALLWASHER
WALL LIGHTS
DIFFUSE LIGHTING
DOWNLIGHTS
SURFACED SPOTS
TRACK SPOTS
PENDANTS
ACOUSTIC LIGHTING
PROFILE SYSTEMS
INNOVATIVE CONFIGURATOR WITH INTEGRATED LIGHT CALCULATION FUNCTION
The PROLICHT configurator enables the creation of individual lighting solutions quickly and easily. The tool offers complete flexibility, from selecting the model to fine-tuning the colour and light distribution. Additionally, the real-time visualisation feature provides instant results for luminaires, spotlights and complex profile systems.
POWERFUL INTEGRATED FUNCTION FOR LIGHT CALCULATION
MORE THAN 5 BILLION CONFIGURATION OPTIONS
SIMPLE CONFIGURATION EVEN FOR COMPLEX PROFILE SYSTEMS
MORE ABOUT THE CONFIGURATOR
START CONFIGURATION
DIGITAL PROJECT MANAGEMENT USING MYPROL
